no: [LEGACY] Separate BGT-era sub-mod. In CtB v3.0+ this is consolidated into the main ctb.tp2. Use main CtB mod for EET installs. Check the Bodies sub-module. BG2 quest content.. Removed from Mod Forge Ultimate: CtB incompatible with WeiDU 251 (DELETE_EXISTING_ANIMATIONS macro)

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Adds a BG2 quest line involving the city of Hlondeth. New areas, NPCs, and a storyline about freeing an occupied city.

co.no: Liberation of Hlondeth: a major quest with a new city.
